drawdown_mechanics._comment: Leveraged-specific DD rules. Other firms will have their own structure.

trailing_dd.description: Trailing DD tracks closed balance (not floating equity). HWM updates only when a trade closes at a new high. Breach check uses equity.
trailing_dd.lock_description: Once closed balance reaches starting + 6%, the DD floor locks at starting balance (zero buffer). Any drop to or below starting balance = breach. See Leveraged docs: the $100k example locks at exactly $100k, not $94k.

daily_dd.description: Daily DD reference = max(balance, equity) at reset time. If equity drops 3% from that reference during the next day, account breaches.
daily_dd.reset_description: Resets at 23:00 GMT+3 (1 hour before market close). The higher of balance or equity at that moment becomes the reference.

post_payout.description: After payout withdrawal, DD limit locks at initial starting balance. Withdrawing profit shrinks DD room.
post_payout.example: Make $7000 profit on $100K, withdraw $5000. New DD floor = $100K. If equity drops to $100K = breach. Only $2000 room left.

funded.scaling_plan: After 3 successful payouts, request account scaling

trading_rules.name: Evaluation — Hit 6% Target
trading_rules.description: Aggressive settings to reach 6% profit target fast
trading_rules.explanation: The evaluation has no consistency rule and no minimum profitable days. The only goal is reaching 6% without hitting 3% daily or 6% total DD. If you blow the fee, retry. Speed matters more than safety because the REAL money is in the funded account. Sessions, exact risk, and trades per day are determined by the optimizer.

trading_rules.name: Funded — Accumulate Phase
trading_rules.description: Conservative trading to meet payout conditions
trading_rules.explanation: Trade conservatively to meet two payout conditions: (1) at least 3 profitable days with >= 0.5% gain each, and (2) no single day exceeds 20% of total profit. If total DD reaches 5% before conditions are met, stop trading for the rest of the period.

trading_rules.name: Funded — Protection Phase
trading_rules.description: STOP trading when payout conditions are met
trading_rules.explanation: Once BOTH conditions are met (3 profitable days at >= 0.5% AND best day under 20% of total), STOP trading completely. Close all positions. Wait for 14-day period to end. Any additional trading could break the consistency rule.

trading_rules.name: 20% Consistency Rule
trading_rules.description: No single day > 20% of total profit in the payout period
trading_rules.explanation: Measured at payout time. More trading days = easier consistency. With 8 days, each is ~12.5%. Spreading trades across more days helps even distribution. Lot size does NOT fix consistency.

trading_rules.name: 3 Minimum Profitable Days
trading_rules.description: At least 3 days must be profitable with >= 0.5% gain each
trading_rules.explanation: Each day must make at least 0.5% of account. With 2 winning trades averaging $50-$80 each, most days clear this easily.

trading_rules.name: 14-Day Period Reset
trading_rules.description: What resets and what doesn't every 14 days
trading_rules.explanation: RESETS: winning trade counter, profitable day count, best day tracker, payout conditions flag, stopped-for-period flag. DOES NOT RESET: account balance (carries over), trailing DD high water mark (carries over).
